457 HLTH_LITERACY_ADMSN_CD HLTH_LITERACY_ADMSN_CD Health Literacy (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, how often the patient need to have someone help them when they read instructions, pamphlets, or other written material from their doctor 
or pharmacy. 0 = Never
1 = Rarely
2 = Sometimes
3 = Often
4 = Always
7 =
